# nuxt4-boilerplate

> Production-ready Nuxt 4 enterprise boilerplate with authentication, multi-tenancy, i18n, and a full AI assistant layer.

## Overview

This is a Nuxt 4 frontend-only boilerplate structured for enterprise teams. It includes:

- Nuxt 4 (compatibilityVersion: 4, srcDir: app/)
- @nuxt/ui (Tailwind-based component library)
- Pinia stores for state management
- JWT authentication with token refresh
- Multi-tenancy (subdomain-based)
- i18n (English + German, lazy-loaded)
- Dashboard layout with sidebar navigation
- AI assistant layer (Phase 2)

## Important Directories

- `app/` — main source directory (Nuxt 4 srcDir)
  - `components/` — Vue components (auto-imported)
    - `ai/` — all AI-related UI components
    - `base/` — reusable base components (DataTable, StatsCard)
    - `dashboard/` — dashboard layout components (Header, Sidebar)
    - `shared/` — shared UI utilities (ColorModeToggle, LanguageSwitcher)
    - `website/` — public-facing page components
  - `composables/` — auto-imported composables
    - `useAiChat.ts` — streaming AI chat with external providers
    - `usePrompts.ts` — prompt template management
    - `useMcp.ts` — MCP (Model Context Protocol) integration
    - `useAuth.ts` — authentication helpers
    - `useApiClient.ts` — typed HTTP client with auth headers
  - `stores/` — Pinia stores (auto-imported)
    - `ai.ts` — AI state: conversations, settings, panel open/close
    - `auth.ts` — authentication state
    - `ui.ts` — UI state (sidebar, notifications)
    - `tenant.ts` — multi-tenant state
  - `pages/` — file-based routing
    - `dashboard/ai/index.vue` — full-screen AI assistant page
    - `dashboard/settings.vue` — includes AI settings section
  - `ai/prompts/` — prompt registry
    - `index.ts` — main entry point
    - `groups.ts` — categorized prompt templates
    - `system.ts` — system-level prompts
  - `plugins/` — Nuxt plugins
    - `ai.client.ts` — AI store hydration and provider config
    - `auth.client.ts` — auth initialization
  - `layouts/` — page layouts
    - `dashboard.vue` — includes AI panel component

## AI Architecture

The AI layer is frontend-only. All intelligence comes from external services.

### Provider integration
- `useAiChat.ts` sends requests to `NUXT_PUBLIC_AI_BASE_URL/chat/completions`
- Uses OpenAI-compatible streaming SSE format
- Compatible with: OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, Anthropic (via proxy), Ollama, LiteLLM, any OpenAI-compatible gateway
- No API keys in the frontend — configure a gateway/proxy server-side

### Prompt system
- Structured prompt registry in `app/ai/prompts/`
- Prompts support `{{variable}}` interpolation
- Categories: general, analysis, writing, coding, data, summarization, translation, custom
- Suggested prompts appear in the AI empty state

### MCP support
- `useMcp.ts` integrates with external MCP servers via JSON-RPC
- Supports: tools/list, tools/call, resources/list, resources/read, prompts/list, prompts/get
- Configure via `NUXT_PUBLIC_MCP_SERVER_URL`

### Key components
- `AiPanel` — slide-over assistant panel (Ctrl+I to toggle)
- `AiCommandPalette` — quick actions (Ctrl+K)
- `AiPromptPicker` — searchable prompt browser
- `AiMarkdownContent` — safe inline markdown renderer (no external deps)
- `AiMessage` — chat message with streaming, citations, tool results
- `AiInput` — textarea with file attachment and prompt picker

## Environment Variables (AI-related)

- `NUXT_PUBLIC_AI_BASE_URL` — AI gateway endpoint (required for AI features)
- `NUXT_PUBLIC_AI_DEFAULT_MODEL` — default model ID (e.g. gpt-4o)
- `NUXT_PUBLIC_AI_DEFAULT_PROVIDER` — provider kind
- `NUXT_PUBLIC_MCP_SERVER_URL` — MCP server URL (optional)

## Key Files

- `/nuxt.config.ts` — Nuxt configuration with runtimeConfig
- `/app/stores/ai.ts` — AI Pinia store (conversations, settings, streaming state)
- `/app/composables/useAiChat.ts` — streaming chat composable
- `/app/ai/prompts/groups.ts` — all prompt templates
- `/shared/types/ai.ts` — TypeScript types for AI features
- `/public/llms.txt` — this file
- `/public/llms-full.txt` — extended AI-readable documentation

## Docs

- `README.md` — full setup, deployment, and DevOps guide
- `CONTRIBUTING.md` — team workflow, commit conventions, PR process
- `deploy/` — nginx, caddy, vercel, and other deployment configs
